## Test plan

## Security checklist

<!-- Skip items that don't apply. Leave unchecked items that need attention. -->

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] User input validated / sanitised
- [ ] SQL queries use parameterised form (no string concat)
- [ ] New endpoints are rate-limited
- [ ] Auth / authorisation verified on new routes
